subtasks.description: Generate a multi-tool orchestration plan to: (1) retrieve project requirements from Jira API, (2) check team availability from calendar API, (3) schedule standup meeting via calendar, and (4) share agenda via Slack. Returns ordered tool-call sequence with parameters and dependency graph.

plan.cost_rationale: This query explicitly asks for multi-tool orchestration across four distinct enterprise systems (Jira, Calendar API, Meeting Scheduler, Slack). A single multitool_plan subtask at mid tier is appropriate because: (1) it requires sequencing tool calls with clear dependencies (requirements → availability check → schedule → notify), (2) the logic is moderately complex but does not involve data reconciliation or policy evaluation, and (3) mid-tier capability is sufficient to generate a coherent multi-step tool-call plan with parameter mapping. We do NOT add separate subtasks for each tool — the multitool_plan agent generates the entire orchestration plan in one call. No cross_recon is needed (no reconciliation across disparate data sources), and no policy_action is needed (no compliance or governance evaluation requested).
